title: [Skyship, The Cells]
description: A powerful, rank odor assaults your senses.  The source appears to be a small, raised stone platform that sits to one side of the room.  Rotting, flyblown food debris is splattered across the platform and scattered alongside it.  Further putrescent piles have been haphazardly shoved into the corners, clearing an open area across the room's center.  Above the platform, the outline of a hatch is visible, cut into the metal ceiling and stuck with decaying organic matter.
